questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某大學研究實驗室需要將 30 TB 資料從本機 Windows 檔案伺服器移轉到 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。該實驗室擁有 1 Gbps 的網路鏈路，與大學的許多其他部門共用。該實驗室希望實施一項資料遷移服務，以最大限度地提高資料傳輸的效能。然而，實驗室需要能夠控制服務使用的頻寬量，以盡量減少對其他部門的影響。資料遷移必須在接下來的 5 天內進行。哪種 AWS 解決方案能夠滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A university research laboratory needs to migrate 30 TB of data from an on-premises Windows file server to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. The laboratory has a 1 Gbps network link that many other departments in the university share. The laboratory wants to implement a data migration service that will maximize the performance of the data transfer. However, the laboratory needs to be able to control the amount of bandwidth that the service uses to minimize the impact on other departments. The data migration must take place within the next 5 days. Which AWS solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Snowcone
A.en: AWS Snowcone

B.zh: Amazon FSx 檔案網關
B.en: Amazon FSx File Gateway

C.zh: AWS DataSync
C.en: AWS DataSync

D.zh: AWS 傳輸系列
D.en: AWS Transfer Family

A.zh: 錯誤。此服務是用於離線資料遷移的實體設備。雖然適合小規模資料遷移，但需要設備運輸時間，無法滿足5天內完成遷移的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is a physical device used for offline data migration. Although it is suitable for small-scale data migration, it requires time to transport the equipment and cannot meet the requirement of completing the migration within 5 days.

B.zh: 錯誤。FSx 檔案閘道主要用於將本機檔案系統匯出至 Amazon FSx。它適合對文件進行連續訪問，但不專門用於大規模資料遷移。
B.en: Incorrect. FSx File Gateway is mainly used to export local file systems to Amazon FSx. It is suitable for continuous access to files, but is not specifically used for large-scale data migration.

C.zh: 正確。本服務是專門為快速、安全地遷移資料而設計的服務。支援頻寬限制功能，控製網路使用，適合共享網路環境下的資料遷移。
C.en: Correct. This service is a service specifically designed to migrate data quickly and securely. It supports bandwidth limitation function to control network usage and is suitable for data migration in a shared network environment.

D.zh: 錯誤。本服務主要用於透過SFTP、FTPS或FTP協定傳輸資料。適合檔案級傳輸，但不適合大規模資料遷移。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is mainly used to transfer data via SFTP, FTPS or FTP protocols. It is suitable for file-level transfer, but is not suitable for large-scale data migration.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (97%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：本服務是專門為快速、安全地遷移資料而設計的服務。支援頻寬限制功能，控製網路使用，適合共享網路環境下的資料遷移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (97%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service specifically designed to migrate data quickly and securely. It supports bandwidth limitation function to control network usage and is suitable for data migration in a shared network environment.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要創建一款行動應用程序，允許用戶在其行動裝置上串流慢動作影片剪輯。目前，該應用程式會擷取影片剪輯並將原始格式的影片剪輯上傳到 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。該應用程式直接從 S3 儲存桶檢索這些影片剪輯。然而，這些影片的原始格式很大。用戶在行動裝置上遇到緩衝和播放問題。該公司希望實施解決方案，以最大限度地提高應用程式的效能和可擴展性，同時最大限度地減少營運開銷。哪種解決方案組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company wants to create a mobile app that allows users to stream slow-motion video clips on their mobile devices. Currently, the app captures video clips and uploads the video clips in raw format into an Amazon S3 bucket. The app retrieves these video clips directly from the S3 bucket. However, the videos are large in their raw format. Users are experiencing issues with buffering and playback on mobile devices. The company wants to implement solutions to maximize the performance and scalability of the app while minimizing operational overhead. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 部署 Amazon CloudFront 進行內容傳遞和快取。
A.en: Deploy Amazon CloudFront for content delivery and caching.

B.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync 在其他 S3 儲存桶中跨 AWS 區域複製視訊檔案。
B.en: Use AWS DataSync to replicate the video files across AW'S Regions in other S3 buckets.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Transcoder 將視訊檔案轉換為更合適的格式。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Transcoder to convert the video files to more appropriate formats.

D.zh: 在本機區域中部署 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 Auto Sealing 群組以進行內容傳輸和快取。
D.en: Deploy an Auto Sealing group of Amazon EC2 instances in Local Zones for content delivery and caching.

E.zh: 部署 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 Auto Scaling 群組以將視訊檔案轉換為更合適的格式。
E.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances to convert the video files to more appropriate formats.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon CloudFront 是一個全球分散式內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，可顯著提高視訊串流效能並減少延遲。它支援快取內容並優化內容交付，適合解決用戶緩衝和播放問題。
A.en: Correct. Amazon CloudFront is a globally distributed content delivery network (CDN) that significantly improves video streaming performance and reduces latency. It supports caching content and optimizes content delivery, suitable for solving user buffering and playback issues.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS DataSync 主要用於資料遷移和同步，而不是用於最佳化視訊串流效能或格式轉換。此選項與問題所需的效能最佳化和視訊播放問題無關。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS DataSync is primarily used for data migration and synchronization, not for optimizing video streaming performance or format conversion. this option has nothing to do with the performance optimization and video playback issues that the question requires.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Elastic Transcoder 是一項專門用於視訊格式轉換的服務，可將影片轉換為適合行動裝置播放的格式。這可以減少視訊檔案的大小，從而解決緩衝問題。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon Elastic Transcoder is a service dedicated to video format conversion, which can convert videos into a format suitable for mobile device playback. This can reduce the video file size, thus solving buffering issues.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 EC2 執行個體進行內容交付和快取需要很高的操作開銷，這不符合問題的「最小化操作開銷」要求。 CloudFront是一個更合適的解決方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Using EC2 instances for content delivery and caching requires high operational overhead, which does not meet the "minimize operational overhead" requirement of the question. CloudFront is a more suitable solution.

E.zh: 錯誤。雖然EC2實例可以用於視訊格式轉換，但這需要額外的管理和操作工作。 Amazon Elastic Transcoder 是一種專門的託管服務，營運成本較低，適合問題需求。
E.en: Incorrect. Although EC2 instances can be used for video format conversion, this requires additional management and operational work. Amazon Elastic Transcoder is a specialized hosting service with lower operational costs and is suitable for problem requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 部署 Amazon CloudFront 進行內容傳遞和快取。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy Amazon CloudFront for content delivery and caching.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (55%)； C (43%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon CloudFront 是一個全球分散式內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，可顯著提高視訊串流效能並減少延遲。它支援快取內容並優化內容交付，適合解決用戶緩衝和播放問題。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (55%); C (43%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon CloudFront is a globally distributed content delivery network (CDN) that significantly improves video streaming performance and reduces latency. It supports caching content and optimizes content delivery, suitable for solving user buffering and playback issues.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在啟動部署在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 叢集上的新應用程序，並使用 Fargate 啟動類型執行 ECS 任務。該公司正在監控 CPU 和記憶體使用情況，因為預計應用程式啟動後會有大量流量。然而，該公司希望在利用率下降時降低成本。解決方案架構師該推薦什麼？
question_text.en: A company is launching a new application deployed on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster and is using the Fargate launch type for ECS tasks. The company is monitoring CPU and memory usage because it is expecting high traffic to the application upon its launch. However, the company wants to reduce costs when utilization decreases. What should a solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 根據先前的流量模式在特定時段進行擴展。
A.en: Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to scale at certain periods based on previous traffic patterns.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函數根據觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報的指標違規來擴展 Amazon ECS。
B.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to scale Amazon ECS based on metric breaches that trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 和簡單的擴展策略，在 ECS 指標違規觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時進行擴展。
C.en: Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling with simple scaling policies to scale when ECS metric breaches trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

D.zh: 將 AWS Application Auto Scaling 與目標追蹤策略結合使用，在 ECS 指標違規觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時進行擴充。
D.en: Use AWS Application Auto Scaling with target tracking policies to scale when ECS metric breaches trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 根據先前的流量模式在特定時間內進行擴展。 EC2 Auto Scaling 主要用於管理 EC2 執行個體的擴展，但問題明確指出使用的是 Fargate 啟動類型，且 Fargate 不依賴 EC2 執行個體。此外，基於「先前的流量模式」的擴充無法即時回應當前的流量需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to scale over specific time periods based on previous traffic patterns. EC2 Auto Scaling is mainly used to manage the expansion of EC2 instances, but the question clearly states that the Fargate launch type is used, and Fargate does not depend on EC2 instances. In addition, scaling based on "previous traffic patterns" cannot respond to current traffic needs in real time.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Lambda 函數根據觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報的指標超出情況擴展 Amazon ECS。雖然可以使用 Lambda 來觸發擴展，但這不是建議的方式。 AWS Application Auto Scaling內建了自動伸縮功能，直接使用效率更高。使用 Lambda 函數會增加複雜性且不符合最佳實務。
B.en: Incorrect. Use an AWS Lambda function to scale Amazon ECS based on metric exceedances that trigger Amazon CloudWatch alarms. Although Lambda can be used to trigger extensions, this is not a recommended way. AWS Application Auto Scaling has built-in automatic scaling function, and it is more efficient to use it directly. Using Lambda functions adds complexity and is inconsistent with best practices.

C.zh: 錯誤。當 ECS 指標超出觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時，使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 和簡單的擴展策略進行擴展。同樣的問題，EC2 Auto Scaling 適用於 EC2 實例，並且問題使用 Fargate 啟動類型。簡單的擴展策略不如目標追蹤策略靈活且有效率。
C.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling and a simple scaling policy to scale when ECS metric exceedances trigger Amazon CloudWatch alarms. Same problem, EC2 Auto Scaling applies to EC2 instances, and the question uses the Fargate launch type. The simple expansion strategy is not as flexible and efficient as the target tracking strategy.

D.zh: 正確。當 ECS 指標超出觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時，使用 AWS Application Auto Scaling 和目標追蹤策略進行擴展。 AWS Application Auto Scaling 支援 Fargate 任務的自動擴充。目標追蹤策略可以根據CloudWatch指標（例如CPU和記憶體使用率）動態調整任務數量，以滿足問題的需求。
D.en: Correct. Use AWS Application Auto Scaling and target tracking policies to scale when ECS metric exceedances trigger Amazon CloudWatch alarms. AWS Application Auto Scaling supports automatic scaling of Fargate tasks. The target tracking strategy can dynamically adjust the number of tasks based on CloudWatch indicators (such as CPU and memory usage) to meet the needs of the question.

answer_text.zh: D. 將 AWS Application Auto Scaling 與目標追蹤策略結合使用，在 ECS 指標違規觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時進行擴充。
answer_text.en: D. Use AWS Application Auto Scaling with target tracking policies to scale when ECS metric breaches trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：當 ECS 指標超出觸發 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時，使用 AWS Application Auto Scaling 和目標追蹤策略進行擴展。 AWS Application Auto Scaling 支援 Fargate 任務的自動擴充。目標追蹤策略可以根據CloudWatch指標（例如CPU和記憶體使用率）動態調整任務數量，以滿足問題的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use AWS Application Auto Scaling and target tracking policies to scale when ECS metric exceedances trigger Amazon CloudWatch alarms. AWS Application Auto Scaling supports automatic scaling of Fargate tasks. The target tracking strategy can dynamically adjust the number of tasks based on CloudWatch indicators (such as CPU and memory usage) to meet the needs of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近在不同的 AWS 區域建立了一個災難復原站點。該公司需要定期在兩個區域的 NFS 檔案系統之間來回傳輸大量資料。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company recently created a disaster recovery site in a different AWS Region. The company needs to transfer large amounts of data back and forth between NFS file systems in the two Regions on a periodic basis. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync。
A.en: Use AWS DataSync.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Snowball 裝置。
B.en: Use AWS Snowball devices.

C.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上設定 SFTP 伺服器。
C.en: Set up an SFTP server on Amazon EC2.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)。
D.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

A.zh: 正確。使用 AWS DataSync AWS DataSync 是一項專門為高效傳輸檔案資料而設計的服務，支援跨區域傳輸，且營運開銷較低。 DataSync可以自動化資料傳輸過程，並且支援NFS檔案系統，非常適合本題的場景。
A.en: Correct. Use AWS DataSync AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to transfer file data efficiently, supports cross-region transfers, and has low operational overhead. DataSync can automate the data transfer process and supports the NFS file system, which is very suitable for the scenario of this question.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Snowball 裝置通常用於一次性遷移大量數據，而不是定期數據傳輸。使用 Snowball 需要手動操作設備，成本昂貴，不符合「LEAST 操作開銷」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS Snowball devices are often used for one-time migration of large amounts of data rather than periodic data transfer. Using Snowball requires manual operation of the device, which is expensive and does not meet the requirements of "LEAST operational overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。設定 SFTP 伺服器需要手動設定和管理 EC2 實例，這會增加營運開銷。雖然可以實現資料傳輸，但不如DataSync那麼有效率和自動化。
C.en: Incorrect. Setting up an SFTP server requires manual configuration and management of EC2 instances, which increases operational overhead. Although data transmission can be achieved, it is not as efficient and automated as DataSync.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 主要用於資料庫遷移，而非檔案系統資料傳輸。本題需傳輸NFS檔案系統數據，DMS不適用。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS DMS is primarily used for database migration, not file system data transfer. This question requires the transmission of NFS file system data, and DMS is not applicable.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 AWS DataSync AWS DataSync 是一項專門為高效傳輸檔案資料而設計的服務，支援跨區域傳輸，且營運開銷較低。 DataSync可以自動化資料傳輸過程，並且支援NFS檔案系統，非常適合本題的場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use AWS DataSync AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to transfer file data efficiently, supports cross-region transfers, and has low operational overhead. DataSync can automate the data transfer process and supports the NFS file system, which is very suitable for the scenario of this question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在為 AWS 雲端中託管的遊戲應用程式設計共享儲存解決方案。該公司需要能夠使用 SMB 用戶端存取資料。該解決方案必須經過全面管理。哪種 AWS 解決方案符合這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is designing a shared storage solution for a gaming application that is hosted in the AWS Cloud. The company needs the ability to use SMB clients to access data. The solution must be fully managed. Which AWS solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 建立一個 AWS DataSync 任務，將資料共用為可掛載檔案系統。將檔案系統掛載到應用程式伺服器上。
A.en: Create an AWS DataSync task that shares the data as a mountable file system. Mount the file system to the application server.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon EC2 Windows 執行個體。在實例上安裝並設定 Windows 檔案共用角色。將應用程式伺服器連接到檔案共用。
B.en: Create an Amazon EC2 Windows instance. Install and configure a Windows file share role on the instance. Connect the application server to the file share.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 檔案系統。將檔案系統附加到來源伺服器。將應用程式伺服器連接到檔案系統。
C.en: Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Attach the file system to the origin server. Connect the application server to the file system.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon S3 儲存桶。向應用程式指派 IAM 角色以授予對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限。將S3儲存桶掛載到應用程式伺服器。
D.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Assign an IAM role to the application to grant access to the S3 bucket. Mount the S3 bucket to the application server.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS DataSync 是一項資料遷移服務，而不是提供共享儲存的解決方案。它不提供直接的SMB協定支持，不符合「完全託管」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS DataSync is a service for data migration, not a solution for providing shared storage. It does not provide direct SMB protocol support and does not meet the requirements of "fully managed".

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以透過 EC2 執行個體配置 Windows 檔案共用以支援 SMB 協議，但這不是「完全託管」的解決方案。使用者需要自行管理EC2實例的作業系統、檔案共用配置和維護。
B.en: Incorrect. While it is possible to configure a Windows file share via an EC2 instance to support the SMB protocol, this is not a "fully managed" solution. Users need to manage the operating system, file share configuration and maintenance of EC2 instances by themselves.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是完全託管的檔案儲存服務，專門支援 SMB 協定。它滿足問題所要求的「完全託管」和「SMB客戶端存取」的要求。
C.en: Correct. Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a fully managed file storage service that exclusively supports the SMB protocol. It meets the requirements of "full hosting" and "SMB client access" required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 是一種物件儲存服務，不支援 SMB 協定。雖然可以透過 IAM 角色授予存取權限，但無法將其作為檔案系統直接安裝到應用程式伺服器。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 is an object storage service and does not support the SMB protocol. While access can be granted through an IAM role, it cannot be mounted directly to the application server as a file system.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 檔案系統。將檔案系統附加到來源伺服器。將應用程式伺服器連接到檔案系統。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Attach the file system to the origin server. Connect the application server to the file system.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是完全託管的檔案儲存服務，專門支援 SMB 協定。它滿足問題所要求的「完全託管」和「SMB客戶端存取」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a fully managed file storage service that exclusively supports the SMB protocol. It meets the requirements of "full hosting" and "SMB client access" required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望為在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的延遲敏感應用程式運行記憶體資料庫。該應用程式每分鐘處理超過100,000筆交易，並且需要高網路吞吐量。解決方案架構師需要提供經濟高效的網路設計，以最大限度地降低資料傳輸費用。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run an in-memory database for a latency-sensitive application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application processes more than 100,000 transactions each minute and requires high network throughput. A solutions architect needs to provide a cost-effective network design that minimizes data transfer charges. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 在同一 AWS 區域內的相同可用區中啟動所有 EC2 執行個體。啟動 EC2 執行個體時指定具有叢集策略的置放群組。
A.en: Launch all EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone within the same AWS Region. Specify a placement group with cluster strategy when launching EC2 instances.

B.zh: 啟動同一 AWS 區域內不同可用區中的所有 EC2 執行個體。啟動 EC2 執行個體時指定具有分割策略的置放群組。
B.en: Launch all EC2 instances in different Availability Zones within the same AWS Region. Specify a placement group with partition strategy when launching EC2 instances.

C.zh: 部署 Auto Scaling 群組，以根據網路使用率目標在不同可用區中啟動 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group to launch EC2 instances in different Availability Zones based on a network utilization target.

D.zh: 使用逐步擴展策略部署 Auto Scaling 群組，以在不同可用區中啟動 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group with a step scaling policy to launch EC2 instances in different Availability Zones.

A.zh: 正確。叢集放置群組原則將實例放置在相同可用區的低延遲伺服器中，最佳化伺服器效能，適合高吞吐量、低延遲的應用場景。同一可用區內的資料傳輸免費，滿足成本優化的要求。
A.en: Correct. The Cluster Placement Group strategy places instances in low-latency servers in the same availability zone, optimizing server performance and suitable for high throughput and low-latency application scenarios. Data transfer within the same availability zone is free and meets the requirements of cost optimization.

B.zh: 錯誤。Partition Placement Group策略適用於分散式應用，主要用於隔離故障域，而非最佳化效能。跨可用區的資料傳輸會產生費用，不符合成本優化的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. The Partition Placement Group strategy is suitable for distributed applications and is mainly used to isolate fault domains and not to optimize performance. Data transfer across Availability Zones will incur charges and does not meet the requirements of cost optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。Auto Scaling Group主要用於動態擴充實例數量，而非最佳化效能。跨可用區的資料傳輸會產生費用，不符合成本優化的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Auto Scaling Group is mainly used to dynamically expand the number of instances, not to optimize performance. Data transfer across Availability Zones will incur charges and does not meet the requirements of cost optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。Step Scaling 策略主要用於根據負載動態調整實例數量，而不是最佳化效能。跨可用區的資料傳輸會產生費用，不符合成本優化的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Step Scaling Policy is mainly used to dynamically adjust the number of instances based on load, not to optimize performance. Data transfer across Availability Zones will incur charges and does not meet the requirements of cost optimization.

answer_text.zh: A. 在同一 AWS 區域內的相同可用區中啟動所有 EC2 執行個體。啟動 EC2 執行個體時指定具有叢集策略的置放群組。
answer_text.en: A. Launch all EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone within the same AWS Region. Specify a placement group with cluster strategy when launching EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：叢集放置群組原則將實例放置在相同可用區的低延遲伺服器中，最佳化伺服器效能，適合高吞吐量、低延遲的應用場景。同一可用區內的資料傳輸免費，滿足成本優化的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Cluster Placement Group strategy places instances in low-latency servers in the same availability zone, optimizing server performance and suitable for high throughput and low-latency application scenarios. Data transfer within the same availability zone is free and meets the requirements of cost optimization.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家主要在本地運行應用程式伺服器的公司決定遷移到 AWS。該公司希望最大限度地減少擴展其本地網際網路小型電腦系統介面 (iSCSI) 儲存的需求。該公司只希望將最近訪問的資料保留在本地。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 解決方案來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company that primarily runs its application servers on premises has decided to migrate to AWS. The company wants to minimize its need to scale its Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI) storage on premises. The company wants only its recently accessed data to remain stored locally. Which AWS solution should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon S3 檔案網關
A.en: Amazon S3 File Gateway

B.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 磁帶網關
B.en: AWS Storage Gateway Tape Gateway

C.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 磁碟區 閘道儲存的磁碟區
C.en: AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway stored volumes

D.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 磁碟區閘道快取卷
D.en: AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway cached volumes

A.zh: 錯誤。該服務主要用於將檔案儲存到 Amazon S3，同時提供本地快取以加快存取速度。適用於檔案級儲存場景，而問題中提到了iSCSI儲存（區塊級儲存），所以該選項不符合要求。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is mainly used to store files to Amazon S3 while providing local caching to speed up access. It is suitable for file-level storage scenarios, and the question mentions iSCSI storage (block-level storage), so this option does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。磁帶閘道主要用於在AWS雲端虛擬化和儲存本機備份磁帶，適用於備份和歸檔場景。該問題沒有提到備份或歸檔要求，因此該選項不符合要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Tape Gateway is mainly used to virtualize and store local backup tapes in the AWS cloud, and is suitable for backup and archiving scenarios. The question does not mention backup or archiving requirements, so this option does not meet the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。儲存卷模式將在本機上儲存所有資料並定期將其備份到AWS雲端。這種模式需要很大的本地儲存容量，而問題要求「本地只儲存最近存取的資料」，因此該選項不滿足要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Stored Volumes mode will store all data locally and back it up to the AWS cloud regularly. This mode requires a large local storage capacity, and the question requires "only recently accessed data is stored locally", so this option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 正確。快取磁碟區模式將所有資料儲存在 AWS 雲端中，並僅在本地快取最近存取的資料。此模式可以在滿足問題要求的同時，有效降低本地儲存需求，因此該選項為正確答案。
D.en: Correct. Cached Volumes mode stores all data in the AWS cloud and caches only recently accessed data locally. This mode can effectively reduce local storage requirements while meeting the question requirements, so this option is the correct answer.

answer_text.zh: D. AWS Storage Gateway 磁碟區閘道快取卷
answer_text.en: D. AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway cached volumes

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：快取磁碟區模式將所有資料儲存在 AWS 雲端中，並僅在本地快取最近存取的資料。此模式可以在滿足問題要求的同時，有效降低本地儲存需求，因此該選項為正確答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cached Volumes mode stores all data in the AWS cloud and caches only recently accessed data locally. This mode can effectively reduce local storage requirements while meeting the question requirements, so this option is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有多個使用合併帳單的 AWS 帳戶。該公司為 Oracle 按需資料庫執行個體執行多個活動高效能 Amazon RDS 90 天。該公司的財務團隊可以存取合併計費帳戶和所有其他 AWS 帳戶中的 AWS Trusted Advisor。財務團隊需要使用適當的 AWS 帳戶來存取 RDS 的 Trusted Advisor 檢查建議。財務團隊必須審查適當的 Trusted Advisor 檢查以降低 RDS 成本。財務團隊應採取哪些步驟組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts that use consolidated billing. The company runs several active high performance Amazon RDS for Oracle On-Demand DB instances for 90 days. The company’s finance team has access to AWS Trusted Advisor in the consolidated billing account and all other AWS accounts. The finance team needs to use the appropriate AWS account to access the Trusted Advisor check recommendations for RDS. The finance team must review the appropriate Trusted Advisor check to reduce RDS costs. Which combination of steps should the finance team take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用執行 RDS 實例的帳戶中的 Trusted Advisor 建議。
A.en: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations from the account where the RDS instances are running.

B.zh: 使用合併計費帳戶中的 Trusted Advisor 建議同時查看所有 RDS 實例檢查。
B.en: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations from the consolidated billing account to see all RDS instance checks at the same time.

C.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 檢查 Amazon RDS 預留執行個體最佳化。
C.en: Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization.

D.zh: 查看 Amazon RDS 空閒資料庫執行個體的 Trusted Advisor 檢查。
D.en: Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances.

E.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 檢查 Amazon Redshift 預留節點最佳化。
E.en: Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon Redshift Reserved Node Optimization.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用來自執行 RDS 實例的帳戶的 Trusted Advisor 建議。雖然Trusted Advisor推薦可以在執行RDS實例的帳戶中查看，但合併計費帳戶可以集中查看所有子帳戶的資源推薦，效率更高。因此這個選項不是最好的選擇。
A.en: Incorrect. Use Trusted Advisor recommendations from the account running the RDS instance. Although Trusted Advisor recommendations can be viewed in the account running the RDS instance, the consolidated billing account can centrally view resource recommendations for all sub-accounts, which is more efficient. Therefore this option is not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。在合併計費帳戶中使用 Trusted Advisor 建議同時檢視所有 RDS 實例檢查。合併計費帳戶可以集中查看所有子帳戶的資源使用情況和最佳化建議，適合跨帳戶的成本優化場景。
B.en: Correct. Use Trusted Advisor recommendations in consolidated billing accounts to view all RDS instance checks simultaneously. Consolidated billing accounts can centrally view the resource usage and optimization suggestions of all sub-accounts, which is suitable for cross-account cost optimization scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項雖然Reserved Instance Optimization是成本優化檢查項，但問題中提到高效能On-Demand實例已運行90天，Idle DB Instances檢查更符合場景要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Review Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization. Although Reserved Instance Optimization is a cost optimization check item, the question mentions that the high-performance On-Demand instance has been running for 90 days, and the Idle DB Instances check is more in line with the scenario requirements.

D.zh: 正確。查看 Trusted Advisor 對 Amazon RDS 空閒資料庫執行個體的檢查。空閒資料庫實例檢查可以幫助識別未充分利用的資料庫實例，以便您可以優化成本。這是問題場景中必需的檢查之一。
D.en: Correct. Review Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances. The Idle DB Instances check can help identify underutilized database instances so you can optimize costs. This is one of the required checks in the question scenario.

E.zh: 錯誤。此選項這個問題討論的是 Amazon RDS 實例，而不是 Amazon Redshift，因此此選項與該問題無關。
E.en: Incorrect. Review Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon Redshift Reserved Node Optimization. The question discusses Amazon RDS instances, not Amazon Redshift, so this option is irrelevant to the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用合併計費帳戶中的 Trusted Advisor 建議同時查看所有 RDS 實例檢查。；D. 查看 Amazon RDS 空閒資料庫執行個體的 Trusted Advisor 檢查。
answer_text.en: B. Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations from the consolidated billing account to see all RDS instance checks at the same time.; D. Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BD (47%)； BC (45%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：在合併計費帳戶中使用 Trusted Advisor 建議同時檢視所有 RDS 實例檢查。合併計費帳戶可以集中查看所有子帳戶的資源使用情況和最佳化建議，適合跨帳戶的成本優化場景。；查看 Trusted Advisor 對 Amazon RDS 空閒資料庫執行個體的檢查。空閒資料庫實例檢查可以幫助識別未充分利用的資料庫實例，以便您可以優化成本。這是問題場景中必需的檢查之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (47%); BC (45%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use Trusted Advisor recommendations in consolidated billing accounts to view all RDS instance checks simultaneously. Consolidated billing accounts can centrally view the resource usage and optimization suggestions of all sub-accounts, which is suitable for cross-account cost optimization scenarios.; Review Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances. The Idle DB Instances check can help identify underutilized database instances so you can optimize costs. This is one of the required checks in the question scenario.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師需要最佳化儲存成本。解決方案架構師必須識別不再被存取或很少存取的任何 Amazon S3 儲存桶。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷實現這一目標？
question_text.en: A solutions architect needs to optimize storage costs. The solutions architect must identify any Amazon S3 buckets that are no longer being accessed or are rarely accessed. Which solution will accomplish this goal with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 S3 Storage Lens 儀錶板分析儲存桶存取模式以取得進階活動指標。
A.en: Analyze bucket access patterns by using the S3 Storage Lens dashboard for advanced activity metrics.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 管理控制臺中的 S3 儀錶板分析儲存桶存取模式。
B.en: Analyze bucket access patterns by using the S3 dashboard in the AWS Management Console.

C.zh: 啟用儲存桶的 Amazon CloudWatch BucketSizeBytes 指標。透過使用 Amazon Athena 的指標資料來分析儲存桶存取模式。
C.en: Turn on the Amazon CloudWatch BucketSizeBytes metric for buckets. Analyze bucket access patterns by using the metrics data with Amazon Athena.

D.zh: 開啟 AWS CloudTrail 以進行 S3 物件監控。使用與 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 整合的 CloudTrail 日誌分析儲存桶存取模式。
D.en: Turn on AWS CloudTrail for S3 object monitoring. Analyze bucket access patterns by using CloudTrail logs that are integrated with Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

A.zh: 正確。S3 Storage Lens 提供進階活動指標，可輕鬆分析儲存桶的存取模式，同時將營運開銷降至最低。它是一款專門用於監控和優化S3儲存的工具，支援跨帳戶、跨區域分析。
A.en: Correct. S3 Storage Lens provides advanced activity metrics that make it easy to analyze a bucket's access patterns with minimal operational overhead. It is a tool specifically designed to monitor and optimize S3 storage, supporting cross-account and cross-region analysis.

B.zh: 錯誤。S3儀錶板提供基本的儲存信息，但不支援詳細的存取模式分析。它不提供高級活動指標，因此不滿足問題要求。
B.en: Incorrect. The S3 dashboard provides basic storage information but does not support detailed access pattern analysis. It does not provide high-level activity metrics and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。BucketSizeBytes 僅提供儲存大小信息，不提供存取模式資料。使用Amazon Athena分析資料增加了操作複雜性，不滿足「最小操作開銷」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. BucketSizeBytes only provides storage size information, not access mode data. Using Amazon Athena to analyze data increases operational complexity and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operational overhead".

D.zh: 錯誤。CloudTrail主要用於記錄API呼叫日誌，而非直接分析儲存桶存取模式。使用 CloudTrail 和 CloudWatch Logs 進行分析需要額外的配置和操作，從而增加了營運開銷。
D.en: Incorrect. CloudTrail is mainly used to record API call logs, rather than directly analyzing bucket access patterns. Analysis using CloudTrail and CloudWatch Logs requires additional configuration and operations, increasing operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 S3 Storage Lens 儀錶板分析儲存桶存取模式以取得進階活動指標。
answer_text.en: A. Analyze bucket access patterns by using the S3 Storage Lens dashboard for advanced activity metrics.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (94%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：S3 Storage Lens 提供進階活動指標，可輕鬆分析儲存桶的存取模式，同時將營運開銷降至最低。它是一款專門用於監控和優化S3儲存的工具，支援跨帳戶、跨區域分析。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (94%). Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 Storage Lens provides advanced activity metrics that make it easy to analyze a bucket's access patterns with minimal operational overhead. It is a tool specifically designed to monitor and optimize S3 storage, supporting cross-account and cross-region analysis.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司向從事人工智慧和機器學習 (AI/ML) 研究的客戶銷售資料集。資料集是大型格式化文件，儲存在 us-east-1 區域的 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。該公司託管一個 Web 應用程序，客戶可以使用該應用程式購買給定資料集的存取權。 Web 應用程式部署在應用程式負載平衡器後面的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。購買後，客戶會收到一個 S3 簽署的 URL，允許存取文件。客戶遍布北美和歐洲。該公司希望降低與數據傳輸相關的成本，並希望維持或提高效能。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company sells datasets to customers who do research in artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI/ML). The datasets are large, formatted files that are stored in an Amazon S3 bucket in the us-east-1 Region. The company hosts a web application that the customers use to purchase access to a given dataset. The web application is deployed on multiple Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. After a purchase is made, customers receive an S3 signed URL that allows access to the files. The customers are distributed across North America and Europe. The company wants to reduce the cost that is associated with data transfers and wants to maintain or improve performance. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在現有 S3 儲存桶上設定 S3 傳輸加速。將客戶請求定向到 S3 Transfer Acceleration 端點。繼續使用 S3 簽章 URL 進行存取控制。
A.en: Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration on the existing S3 bucket. Direct customer requests to the S3 Transfer Acceleration endpoint. Continue to use S3 signed URLs for access control.

B.zh: 以現有 S3 儲存桶作為來源部署 Amazon CloudFront 指派。將客戶請求導向到 CloudFront URL。切換到 CloudFront 簽章 URL 進行存取控制。
B.en: Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the existing S3 bucket as the origin. Direct customer requests to the CloudFront URL. Switch to CloudFront signed URLs for access control.

C.zh: 在 eu-central-1 區域中設定第二個 S3 儲存桶，並在儲存桶之間進行 S3 跨區域複製。將客戶請求直接發送至最近的區域。繼續使用 S3 簽章 URL 進行存取控制。
C.en: Set up a second S3 bucket in the eu-central-1 Region with S3 Cross-Region Replication between the buckets. Direct customer requests to the closest Region. Continue to use S3 signed URLs for access control.

D.zh: 修改 Web 應用程式以將資料集串流傳輸給最終使用者。配置 Web 應用程式以從現有 S3 儲存桶讀取資料。直接在應用程式中實施存取控制。
D.en: Modify the web application to enable streaming of the datasets to end users. Configure the web application to read the data from the existing S3 bucket. Implement access control directly in the application.

A.zh: 錯誤。S3傳輸加速可以加速跨區域資料傳輸，但主要優化上傳速度，而不是下載速度。雖然您可以繼續使用 S3 簽署 URL，但傳輸加速不會顯著降低北美和歐洲用戶的資料傳輸成本或提高下載效能。該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. S3 Transfer Acceleration can accelerate cross-region data transfer, but it mainly optimizes upload speed, not download speed. While you can continue to use S3 signed URLs, Transfer Acceleration does not significantly reduce data transfer costs or improve download performance for North American and European users. This option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。CloudFront 是一個全球內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，可將 S3 中的資料快取並分發到邊緣位置，從而顯著降低資料傳輸成本並提高效能。 CloudFront簽名URL可實現更安全的存取控制，同時優化北美和歐洲用戶的存取速度。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
B.en: Correct. CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that caches and distributes data in S3 to edge locations, significantly reducing data transfer costs and improving performance. CloudFront signed URL can achieve more secure access control while optimizing the access speed for North American and European users. This option fully meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。跨區域複製透過將資料複製到多個區域來優化效能。這種方法增加了儲存成本，並且需要額外的邏輯來管理使用者請求的區域分配。這種方法比 CloudFront 更昂貴、更複雜。該選項不符合題目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Cross-region replication optimizes performance by copying data to multiple regions. This approach increases storage costs and requires additional logic to manage user-requested zone allocations. This approach is more expensive and complex than CloudFront. This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。串流可以降低一次性下載的頻寬要求，但需要對應用程式進行重大修改。這種方法並不能顯著降低北美和歐洲用戶的資料傳輸成本或最佳化效能。實現複雜度比較高。該選項不符合題目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Streaming can reduce the bandwidth requirements of a one-time download, but requires significant modifications to the application. This approach does not significantly reduce data transfer costs or optimize performance for North American and European users. The implementation complexity is relatively high. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 以現有 S3 儲存桶作為來源部署 Amazon CloudFront 指派。將客戶請求導向到 CloudFront URL。切換到 CloudFront 簽章 URL 進行存取控制。
answer_text.en: B. Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the existing S3 bucket as the origin. Direct customer requests to the CloudFront URL. Switch to CloudFront signed URLs for access control.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：CloudFront 是一個全球內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，可將 S3 中的資料快取並分發到邊緣位置，從而顯著降低資料傳輸成本並提高效能。 CloudFront簽名URL可實現更安全的存取控制，同時優化北美和歐洲用戶的存取速度。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that caches and distributes data in S3 to edge locations, significantly reducing data transfer costs and improving performance. CloudFront signed URL can achieve more secure access control while optimizing the access speed for North American and European users. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 設計一個用於處理保險報價的 Web 應用程式。用戶將向應用程式請求報價。報價必須按報價類型分隔，必須在24小時內回復，且不得遺失。此解決方案必須最大限度地提高營運效率並最大限度地減少維護。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is using AWS to design a web application that will process insurance quotes. Users will request quotes from the application. Quotes must be separated by quote type, must be responded to within 24 hours, and must not get lost. The solution must maximize operational efficiency and must minimize maintenance. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 根據報價類型建立多個 Amazon Kinesis 資料流。配置 Web 應用程式以將訊息傳送到正確的資料流。配置每個後端應用程式伺服器群組以使用 Kinesis Client Library (KCL) 來池化來自其自己的資料流的訊息。
A.en: Create multiple Amazon Kinesis data streams based on the quote type. Configure the web application to send messages to the proper data stream. Configure each backend group of application servers to use the Kinesis Client Library (KCL) to pool messages from its own data stream.

B.zh: 為每個報價類型建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數和一個 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題。將 Lambda 函數訂閱到其關聯的 SNS 主題。配置應用程式以將報價請求發佈到適當的 SNS 主題。
B.en: Create an AWS Lambda function and an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic for each quote type. Subscribe the Lambda function to its associated SNS topic. Configure the application to publish requests for quotes to the appropriate SNS topic.

C.zh: 建立單一 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題。將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列訂閱到 SNS 主題。配置 SNS 訊息過濾，以根據報價類型將訊息發佈到正確的 SQS 佇列。配置每個後端應用程式伺服器以使用自己的 SQS 佇列。
C.en: Create a single Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues to the SNS topic. Configure SNS message filtering to publish messages to the proper SQS queue based on the quote type. Configure each backend application server to use its own SQS queue.

D.zh: 根據報價類型建立多個 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流，以將資料流傳輸到 Amazon OpenSearch Service 叢集。配置應用程式以將訊息傳送到正確的傳輸流。設定每個後端應用程式伺服器群組以搜尋來自 OpenSearch Service 的訊息並進行相應的處理。
D.en: Create multiple Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery streams based on the quote type to deliver data streams to an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster. Configure the application to send messages to the proper delivery stream. Configure each backend group of application servers to search for the messages from OpenSearch Service and process them accordingly.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Kinesis適合即時資料流處理，但問題是資訊不能遺失，需要高效率維護。 Kinesis需要額外的管理和開發工作（如KCL），不符合「最大化運作效率和最小化維護」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon Kinesis is suitable for real-time data stream processing, but the problem is that the information cannot be lost and efficient maintenance is required. Kinesis requires additional management and development work (such as KCL) and does not meet the requirements of "maximizing operational efficiency and minimizing maintenance".

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然 SNS可以傳送訊息，但並不能保證訊息的持久性（訊息可能會遺失）。 Lambda函數的觸發也不適合用於處理需要持久化儲存的資訊列表場景。
B.en: Incorrect. Although SNS can send information, it does not guarantee the persistence of information (information may be lost). The triggering of Lambda functions is also not suitable for processing information list scenarios that require persistent storage.

C.zh: 正確。此選項結合了 SNS 和 SQS 的優點。 SNS負責資訊分發，SQS負責資訊持久和處理。透過 SNS 訊息處理，可以根據請求類型將訊息路由到正確的 SQS 佇列。每個後端應用伺服器都使用自己的SQS佇列，確保資訊不會遺失，滿足業務需求。
C.en: Correct. this option combines the advantages of SNS and SQS. SNS is responsible for information distribution, and SQS is responsible for information persistence and processing. With SNS message processing, messages can be routed to the correct SQS queue based on the request type. Each backend application server uses its own SQS queue to ensure that information is not lost and meets business needs.

D.zh: 錯誤。Kinesis Data Firehose 主要用於將資料傳輸到儲存或分析服務（例如 OpenSearch），而不是資料收集場景。此選項不滿足問題的資訊持久性和效能要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Kinesis Data Firehose is mainly used for data transmission to storage or analysis services (such as OpenSearch), rather than data collection scenarios. This option does not meet the information persistence and performance requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立單一 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題。將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列訂閱到 SNS 主題。配置 SNS 訊息過濾，以根據報價類型將訊息發佈到正確的 SQS 佇列。配置每個後端應用程式伺服器以使用自己的 SQS 佇列。
answer_text.en: C. Create a single Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues to the SNS topic. Configure SNS message filtering to publish messages to the proper SQS queue based on the quote type. Configure each backend application server to use its own SQS queue.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項結合了 SNS 和 SQS 的優點。 SNS負責資訊分發，SQS負責資訊持久和處理。透過 SNS 訊息處理，可以根據請求類型將訊息路由到正確的 SQS 佇列。每個後端應用伺服器都使用自己的SQS佇列，確保資訊不會遺失，滿足業務需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: this option combines the advantages of SNS and SQS. SNS is responsible for information distribution, and SQS is responsible for information persistence and processing. With SNS message processing, messages can be routed to the correct SQS queue based on the request type. Each backend application server uses its own SQS queue to ensure that information is not lost and meets business needs.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個在多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式。每個 EC2 執行個體都附加多個 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 資料磁碟區。應用程式的 EC2 執行個體配置和資料需要每晚備份。該應用程式還需要在不同的 AWS 區域中可恢復。哪一種解決方案能夠以最高效的方式滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that runs on several Amazon EC2 instances. Each EC2 instance has multiple Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) data volumes attached to it. The application’s EC2 instance configuration and data need to be backed up nightly. The application also needs to be recoverable in a different AWS Region. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

A.zh: 編寫一個 AWS Lambda 函數，用於安排應用程式 EBS 磁碟區的夜間快照並將快照複製到不同的區域。
A.en: Write an AWS Lambda function that schedules nightly snapshots of the application’s EBS volumes and copies the snapshots to a different Region.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫以執行夜間備份。將備份複製到另一個區域。將應用程式的 EC2 執行個體新增為資源。
B.en: Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup to perform nightly backups. Copy the backups to another Region. Add the application’s EC2 instances as resources.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫以執行夜間備份。將備份複製到另一個區域。將應用程式的 EBS 磁碟區新增為資源。
C.en: Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup to perform nightly backups. Copy the backups to another Region. Add the application’s EBS volumes as resources.

D.zh: 編寫一個 AWS Lambda 函數，用於安排應用程式 EBS 磁碟區的夜間快照並將快照複製到不同的可用區。
D.en: Write an AWS Lambda function that schedules nightly snapshots of the application's EBS volumes and copies the snapshots to a different Availability Zone.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用AWS Lambda函數可以實現自動化備份，但需要手動編寫程式碼來管理快照和跨區域複製，增加了開發和維護的複雜度。雖然可以滿足需求，但運作效率較低，不是最優方案。
A.en: Incorrect. Using AWS Lambda functions can realize automated backup, but it requires manual writing of code to manage snapshots and cross-region replication, which increases the complexity of development and maintenance. Although it can meet the needs, the operation efficiency is low and it is not the optimal solution.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Backup 是一項託管服務，可讓您輕鬆建立備份計畫並自動執行備份任務。將EC2實例作為資源添加到備份計劃中，可以備份實例配置和數據，並支援跨區域複製。運作效率高，完全滿足問題要求。
B.en: Correct. AWS Backup is a managed service that makes it easy to create backup plans and automate backup tasks. Adding EC2 instances as resources to the backup plan can back up instance configuration and data, and supports cross-region replication. The operation efficiency is high and it fully meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以備份 EBS 卷，但問題需要備份整個 EC2 執行個體的配置和數據，而不僅僅是 EBS 卷。此選項不涵蓋EC2實例的配置備份，因此不能完全滿足要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Although EBS volumes can be backed up, the question requires backing up the configuration and data of the entire EC2 instance, not just the EBS volumes. This option does not cover the configuration backup of the EC2 instance and therefore does not fully meet the requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項僅將快照複製到另一個可用區，而不是另一個區域，無法滿足問題所要求的跨區域復原要求。使用Lambda函數會增加開發和維護的複雜性，導致運作效率降低。
D.en: Incorrect. This option only copies the snapshot to another availability zone, not another region, and cannot meet the cross-region recovery requirements required by the question. Using Lambda functions increases the complexity of development and maintenance, and results in lower operating efficiency.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫以執行夜間備份。將備份複製到另一個區域。將應用程式的 EC2 執行個體新增為資源。
answer_text.en: B. Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup to perform nightly backups. Copy the backups to another Region. Add the application’s EC2 instances as resources.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (94%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Backup 是一項託管服務，可讓您輕鬆建立備份計畫並自動執行備份任務。將EC2實例作為資源添加到備份計劃中，可以備份實例配置和數據，並支援跨區域複製。運作效率高，完全滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (94%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Backup is a managed service that makes it easy to create backup plans and automate backup tasks. Adding EC2 instances as resources to the backup plan can back up instance configuration and data, and supports cross-region replication. The operation efficiency is high and it fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上建立行動應用程式。該公司希望將其覆蓋範圍擴大到數百萬用戶。公司需要建立一個平臺，以便授權使用者可以在行動裝置上觀看公司的內容。解決方案架構師應該建議什麼來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a mobile app on AWS. The company wants to expand its reach to millions of users. The company needs to build a platform so that authorized users can watch the company’s content on their mobile devices. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將內容發佈到公用 Amazon S3 儲存桶。使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰來串流內容。
A.en: Publish content to a public Amazon S3 bucket. Use AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to stream content.

B.zh: 在行動應用程式和 AWS 環境之間設定 IPsec VPN 以串流內容。
B.en: Set up IPsec VPN between the mobile app and the AWS environment to stream content.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudFront。提供簽名 URL 以串流內容。
C.en: Use Amazon CloudFront. Provide signed URLs to stream content.

D.zh: 在行動應用程式和 AWS 環境之間設定 AWS 用戶端 VPN 以串流傳輸內容。
D.en: Set up AWS Client VPN between the mobile app and the AWS environment to stream content.

A.zh: 錯誤。將內容發佈到公用 S3 儲存桶會公開內容，無法確保只有授權使用者才能存取它。雖然 AWS KMS 提供加密功能，但它不直接支援串流服務，也無法解決內容分發的效能問題。
A.en: Incorrect. Publishing content to a public S3 bucket exposes the content and fails to ensure that only authorized users can access it. While AWS KMS provides encryption capabilities, it does not directly support streaming services and does not address performance issues with content distribution.

B.zh: 錯誤。IPsec VPN 主要用於安全網路連接，而非內容分發。不適合大規模用戶存取場景，效能和成本也不適合串流媒體業務。
B.en: Incorrect. IPsec VPN is primarily used for secure network connectivity, not content distribution. It is not suitable for large-scale user access scenarios, and its performance and cost are not suitable for streaming media services.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon CloudFront 是一個全球內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，可有效地交付內容並支援串流服務。簽名 URL 透過確保只有授權使用者才能存取內容來滿足安全要求。
C.en: Correct. Amazon CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that efficiently delivers content and supports streaming services. Signed URLs satisfy security requirements by ensuring that only authorized users can access content.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 用戶端 VPN 主要用於遠端使用者安全存取 AWS 資源，而非用於內容分發。不適合串流媒體業務場景，無法解決效能問題。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Client VPN is primarily used for remote user secure access to AWS resources, not for content distribution. It is not suitable for streaming service scenarios and cannot solve performance problems.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Amazon CloudFront。提供簽名 URL 以串流內容。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon CloudFront. Provide signed URLs to stream content.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon CloudFront 是一個全球內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，可有效地交付內容並支援串流服務。簽名 URL 透過確保只有授權使用者才能存取內容來滿足安全要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that efficiently delivers content and supports streaming services. Signed URLs satisfy security requirements by ensuring that only authorized users can access content.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有一個本地 MySQL 資料庫，供全球銷售團隊使用，但存取模式不頻繁。銷售團隊要求資料庫的停機時間最少。資料庫管理員希望將此資料庫遷移到 AWS，而不選擇特定執行個體類型，以應對未來更多使用者的需求。解決方案架構師應該推薦哪一種服務？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises MySQL database used by the global sales team with infrequent access patterns. The sales team requires the database to have minimal downtime. A database administrator wants to migrate this database to AWS without selecting a particular instance type in anticipation of more users in the future. Which service should a solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: Amazon Aurora MySQL
A.en: Amazon Aurora MySQL

B.zh: 適用於 MySQL 的 Amazon Aurora 無伺服器
B.en: Amazon Aurora Serverless for MySQL

C.zh: Amazon Redshift Spectrum
C.en: Amazon Redshift Spectrum

D.zh: 適用於 MySQL 的 Amazon RDS
D.en: Amazon RDS for MySQL

A.zh: 錯誤。本服務是相容MySQL的高效能關聯式資料庫服務。 Aurora MySQL 雖然提供了高可用性和效能，但它需要選擇特定的實例類型，這不符合問題中「不選擇特定實例類型」的要點。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is a high-performance relational database service compatible with MySQL. Although Aurora MySQL provides high availability and performance, it requires the selection of a specific instance type, which does not meet the point of "not selecting a specific instance type" in the question.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon Aurora Serverless 是一種按需自動擴容資料庫服務，支援 MySQL，適合不頻繁存取的場景。無需選擇特定實例類型，可根據負載自動調整容量，滿足問題中「遷移資料庫、支援未來擴展、最小化停機時間」的要求。
B.en: Correct. Amazon Aurora Serverless is an on-demand automatic expansion database service that supports MySQL and is suitable for infrequent access scenarios. It does not need to select a specific instance type and can automatically adjust capacity according to load, meeting the requirements of "migrating databases, supporting future expansion, and minimizing downtime" in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。本服務是分析資料的服務，適合處理大規模資料集。它不是關係型資料庫服務，不支援MySQL資料庫遷移。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is a service for analyzing data and is suitable for processing large-scale data sets. It is not a relational database service and does not support MySQL database migration.

D.zh: 錯誤。本服務是與 MySQL 相容的託管關係型資料庫服務。雖然支援遷移，但是需要選擇具體實例類型，這就是問題中「不選擇具體實例類型」的要點。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is a managed relational database service compatible with MySQL. Although it supports migration, you need to select a specific instance type, which is the point of "not selecting a specific instance type" in the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 適用於 MySQL 的 Amazon Aurora 無伺服器
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Aurora Serverless for MySQL

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Aurora Serverless 是一種按需自動擴容資料庫服務，支援 MySQL，適合不頻繁存取的場景。無需選擇特定實例類型，可根據負載自動調整容量，滿足問題中「遷移資料庫、支援未來擴展、最小化停機時間」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Aurora Serverless is an on-demand automatic expansion database service that supports MySQL and is suitable for infrequent access scenarios. It does not need to select a specific instance type and can automatically adjust capacity according to load, meeting the requirements of "migrating databases, supporting future expansion, and minimizing downtime" in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司遭遇了一次漏洞，影響了其本地資料中心的多個應用程式。攻擊者利用了伺服器上運行的自訂應用程式中的漏洞。該公司目前正在將其應用程式遷移到在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上運行。該公司希望實施一種解決方案，主動掃描 EC2 執行個體上的漏洞並發送詳細說明發現結果的報告。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company experienced a breach that affected several applications in its on-premises data center. The attacker took advantage of vulnerabilities in the custom applications that were running on the servers. The company is now migrating its applications to run on Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to implement a solution that actively scans for vulnerabilities on the EC2 instances and sends a report that details the findings. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 部署 AWS Shield 以掃描 EC2 執行個體是否有漏洞。建立 AWS Lambda 函數以將任何發現記錄到 AWS CloudTrail。
A.en: Deploy AWS Shield to scan the EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. Create an AWS Lambda function to log any findings to AWS CloudTrail.

B.zh: 部署 Amazon Macie 和 AWS Lambda 函數以掃描 EC2 執行個體是否有漏洞。將所有發現記錄到 AWS CloudTrail。
B.en: Deploy Amazon Macie and AWS Lambda functions to scan the EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. Log any findings to AWS CloudTrail.

C.zh: 開啟 Amazon GuardDuty。將 GuardDuty 代理程式部署到 EC2 執行個體。配置 AWS Lambda 函數以自動產生和分發詳細說明調查結果的報告。
C.en: Turn on Amazon GuardDuty. Deploy the GuardDuty agents to the EC2 instances. Configure an AWS Lambda function to automate the generation and distribution of reports that detail the findings.

D.zh: 開啟 Amazon Inspector。將 Amazon Inspector 代理程式部署到 EC2 執行個體。配置 AWS Lambda 函數以自動產生和分發詳細說明調查結果的報告。
D.en: Turn on Amazon Inspector. Deploy the Amazon Inspector agent to the EC2 instances. Configure an AWS Lambda function to automate the generation and distribution of reports that detail the findings.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Shield 主要用於保護應用程式免受 DDoS 攻擊，而不是掃描 EC2 執行個體是否有漏洞。它不具備主動掃描和報告漏洞的能力。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Shield is primarily used to protect applications from DDoS attacks, not to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It does not have the capability to proactively scan and report vulnerabilities.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Macie 主要用於識別和保護敏感資料（例如 PII），而不是掃描 EC2 執行個體是否有漏洞。不適合漏洞掃描。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon Macie is primarily used to identify and protect sensitive data (such as PII), not to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It is not suitable for vulnerability scanning.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon GuardDuty 是一種威脅偵測服務，用於識別惡意活動和異常行為，但它並不專注於漏洞掃描。 GuardDuty 不需要將代理程式附加到 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify malicious activity and anomalous behavior, but it does not focus on vulnerability scanning. GuardDuty does not require an agent to be attached to the EC2 instance.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon Inspector 是專門用於掃描 EC2 執行個體是否有漏洞的服務。它主動檢測安全問題並產生詳細報告。 Amazon Inspector 需要在 EC2 執行個體上安裝代理程式才能執行掃描任務。
D.en: Correct. Amazon Inspector is a service specifically designed to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It proactively detects security issues and generates detailed reports. Amazon Inspector requires an agent installed on the EC2 instance to perform scanning tasks.
